meta.question: Is there an exclusive gateway in this model? (Model ID: 2b18c5f00a5a46159c6cb6a3e2bc79e9)

Yes. In model ID 2b18c5f00a5a46159c6cb6a3e2bc79e9 (matched via tai:originalId), there are 4 exclusive gateways (type bboExt:ExclusiveGateway):
